message:
feat(e2e): interactive TUI viewer for run records and benchmarks (bd-1w6k.6.4)

Full-screen frankentui-based viewer with two tabs (Runs / Benchmarks),
split-pane list+detail layout, keyboard navigation (j/k/Up/Down/Tab/PgUp/PgDn),
and comprehensive detail panels showing timings, hashes, integrity, latency
stats, and throughput. Accepts JSONL files as CLI args.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
